title: arnica subplumosa var. silvatica
intro: Arnica subplumosa var. silvatica, also known as mountain arnica, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of mountain arnica include reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Arnica subplumosa var. silvatica include topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as tinctures and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, from minor skin irritations to more serious conditions.
